DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string — auto-set when you add a Railway PostgreSQL service

SECRET_KEY.description: JWT secret key — generate with: openssl rand -hex 32

REDIS_URL.description: Redis connection URL — auto-set when you add a Railway Redis service

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Google Gemini API key from aistudio.google.com

SMTP_PORT.description: SMTP server port (587 for Gmail STARTTLS)

SENDER_EMAIL.description: Email address to send notifications from

SENDER_PASSWORD.description: Gmail App Password (16 chars) — NOT your account password

CORS_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated list of allowed frontend origins, e.g. https://your-app.vercel.app

migrate_on_start.description: Set to 'true' on first deploy to create database tables, then set to 'false'
